_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.

level_alerts.note: Break of 0.707 = prior pivot gone. Short on retest from below. SL 0.713, TP 0.700. Risk-off + AUD first-to-bleed. Catalyst HARDENING Apr 21 09:09 UTC: Iran MFA explicit 'no plans to send negotiators' to Islamabad + 'US violated ceasefire from beginning' (Hormuz blockade since Apr 13 + overnight US seizure of Iranian container ship); Vance: '21 hrs talks, no agreement' prior round; Trump: extension 'highly unlikely'. De-escalation tail thinning. T-~15h to ceasefire expiry 00:00 GMT Wed. Level 0.707 still ~1.2% below current 0.7150 — needs the ceasefire cliff to break (or talks-fail confirm). Need M15 bear BOS + rejection wick on retest. Conv 3.

Price 159.179 (09:54 UTC, +1.2p vs 09:40, still 0.27 below 159.45 fade zone 159.45-161.95 per MarketPulse/OANDA; bearish M15 BOS intact, bull FVG 159.02-159.115 unmitigated below). Katayama post-Bessent 'bold action' (JapanTimes Apr 16). Fade SELL on entry into zone — needs M15 bear BOS + rejection wick on first touch of 159.45+ for 7-gate. SL 161.00, TP1 158.70, TP2 157.20. Conv 3. 2-WAY RISK: (a) Iran risk-off flip bids yen (ceasefire collapse → safe-haven bid — T-~13.5h to Wed 00:00 GMT expiry, Iran pulled out per Euronews + Vance flying Tue), (b) Islamabad surprise deal → USD bid but intervention risk caps. Monitor M15 for first touch OR mitigation of 159.02-159.115 bull FVG from above.

WTI 86.617 (09:54 UTC, -0.19 vs 09:40, continuing reversal of earlier 87.15 pop; bearish M15 BOS 86.621 still intact — no bull BOS yet).
